source_pr.title: planner/core: migrate test-infra to testify for integration_test.go
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Issue Number: close #28412

### Release note

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: require.False(t, tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
failure_signature: require.False(t, tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it asserted an exact plan/EXPLAIN output that can vary between runs. Exact plan/EXPLAIN assertions are brittle when optimizer choices can vary. This PR stabilizes it by: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.
fix_pattern: Sort results / enforce deterministic ordering before assertions to avoid nondeterministic flakiness.

evidence: evidence: require.False(t, tk.MustUseIndex("select a from t order by a", "i_a")) (planner/core/integration_test.go)
